lifecycle.description: Typed entity lifecycle write. Sets the entity's lifecycle status/reason (the canonical soft-delete / supersession axis), validated and stored as typed lifecycle state. This is the ONLY channel for entity lifecycle; free-form `metadata` cannot touch it.

metadata.description: Free-form non-schema metadata stored alongside the entity. It is carried verbatim as free-form data (nested under the entity's typed metadata envelope); it cannot set the entity's lifecycle. Set lifecycle via the typed `lifecycle` field, which is the only channel for it.
metadata.title: Metadata

properties.description: Entity properties; keys must be declared by the entity schema.
properties.title: Properties

EntityLifecycleInput.description:
Typed, review-SAFE lifecycle write for an entity.

Carries ONLY the entity lifecycle axis. Entities have no review axis, so there
is nothing else this could touch. The server validates ``status`` against the
entity lifecycle vocabulary and stores it as the typed entity lifecycle state.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the lifecycle change.
reason.title: Reason

status.description: Entity lifecycle status: live, superseded, or retired.
status.title: Status

EntityLifecycleInput.title: EntityLifecycleInput

label.description: Optional human-readable label for this reference.
label.title: Label

metadata.description: Extra key/values; unknown top-level keys are folded in here.
metadata.title: Metadata

row_index.description: Optional zero-based row index within the table.
row_index.title: Row Index

source.description: Origin system or dataset of the referenced record.
source.title: Source

source_record_id.description: Identifier of the record within that source.
source_record_id.title: Source Record Id

table.description: Optional table name when the source is tabular.
table.title: Table

RelationshipLifecycleInput.description:
Typed, review-SAFE lifecycle write for a relationship edge.

Carries ONLY the lifecycle axis (``status`` + ``reason``). It deliberately has
NO ``review`` or ``group_override`` field: a lifecycle write through this
channel is structurally incapable of approving/rejecting an edge or flipping
the group override -- those stay exclusive to the governed feedback / group
paths. The server sets only ``assertion.lifecycle`` from this input.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the lifecycle change.
reason.title: Reason

status.description: Relationship lifecycle status: active, inactive, superseded, or retracted.
status.title: Status

RelationshipLifecycleInput.title: RelationshipLifecycleInput

evidence_refs.description: External provenance references shared by multiple relationships.
evidence_refs.title: Evidence Refs

source_evidence.description: Source-artifact locators shared by multiple relationships.
source_evidence.title: Source Evidence

chunk_id.title: Chunk Id

expected_content_hash.description: Expected content hash to detect drift when dereferenced later.
expected_content_hash.title: Expected Content Hash

heading_path.description: Heading breadcrumb locating the block when no chunk_id is given.
heading_path.title: Heading Path

label.description: Optional human-readable label for this locator.
label.title: Label

source_artifact_id.title: Source Artifact Id

RelationshipLifecycleInput.description:
Typed, review-SAFE lifecycle write for a relationship edge.

Carries ONLY the lifecycle axis (``status`` + ``reason``). It deliberately has
NO ``review`` or ``group_override`` field: a lifecycle write through this
channel is structurally incapable of approving/rejecting an edge or flipping
the group override -- those stay exclusive to the governed feedback / group
paths. The server sets only ``assertion.lifecycle`` from this input.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the lifecycle change.
reason.title: Reason

status.description: Relationship lifecycle status: active, inactive, superseded, or retracted.
status.title: Status

RelationshipLifecycleInput.title: RelationshipLifecycleInput

expected_content_hash.title: Expected Content Hash

heading_path.description: Heading breadcrumb locating the block when no chunk_id is given.
heading_path.title: Heading Path

label.title: Label

source_artifact_id.title: Source Artifact Id

json_schema.description:
Typed, review-SAFE lifecycle write for a relationship edge.

Carries ONLY the lifecycle axis (``status`` + ``reason``). It deliberately has
NO ``review`` or ``group_override`` field: a lifecycle write through this
channel is structurally incapable of approving/rejecting an edge or flipping
the group override -- those stay exclusive to the governed feedback / group
paths. The server sets only ``assertion.lifecycle`` from this input.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the lifecycle change.
reason.title: Reason

status.description: Relationship lifecycle status: active, inactive, superseded, or retracted.
status.title: Status

json_schema.title: RelationshipLifecycleInput

json_schema.description: Source-artifact / provider-trace recency plus config-compatibility facts.
json_schema.title: StateHealthFreshnessSection

json_schema.description:
Candidate-group lifecycle counts plus the unresolved-backlog age span.

Age is scoped to unresolved (pending_review + applying) groups; resolved
groups only accumulate age and are not an actionable maintenance signal.
json_schema.title: StateHealthGroupsSection

json_schema.description: Graph-integrity counts reused from the deterministic evaluate findings.
json_schema.title: StateHealthIntegritySection

json_schema.description: Edge provenance tally by source_ref class.
json_schema.title: StateHealthProvenanceSection

StateHealthFreshnessSection.description: Source-artifact / provider-trace recency plus config-compatibility facts.
StateHealthFreshnessSection.title: StateHealthFreshnessSection

StateHealthGroupsSection.description:
Candidate-group lifecycle counts plus the unresolved-backlog age span.

Age is scoped to unresolved (pending_review + applying) groups; resolved
groups only accumulate age and are not an actionable maintenance signal.
StateHealthGroupsSection.title: StateHealthGroupsSection

StateHealthIntegritySection.description: Graph-integrity counts reused from the deterministic evaluate findings.
StateHealthIntegritySection.title: StateHealthIntegritySection

StateHealthProvenanceSection.description: Edge provenance tally by source_ref class.
StateHealthProvenanceSection.title: StateHealthProvenanceSection

StateHealthSignalsSection.description: Support-signal counts pending review under the evidence guard.
StateHealthSignalsSection.title: StateHealthSignalsSection

json_schema.description:
Read-only deterministic state-health report.

Aggregates raw maintenance metrics (counts, ages, timestamps) and binary
deterministic facts only. Carries NO scoring, ranking, severity, or
threshold-derived statuses — agents interpret; core reports defensible facts.
json_schema.title: StateHealthResult

json_schema.description: Support-signal counts pending review under the evidence guard.
json_schema.title: StateHealthSignalsSection
